creator: Nakai@Technologist.com
text:
The MASTER_SITE of xpuyo MASTER_SITES changed.
Here is the patch.

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
diff -ruN xpuyo.orig/Makefile xpuyo/Makefile
--- xpuyo.orig/Makefile Thu Sep  4 16:04:29 1997
+++ xpuyo/Makefile      Thu Sep  4 16:05:15 1997
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
 DISTNAME=      xpuyo
 PKGNAME=        xpuyo-0.0
 CATEGORIES=    games
-MASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.huee.hokudai.ac.jp/pub/games/
+MASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.meme.hokudai.ac.jp/pub/games/
 
 MAINTAINER=    Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
